name: Kenneth, Aid
description: Often called "Toodles" but better known as "Squash". Looks so innocent that we haven't the heart to say anything about him. Lost his voice during the Senior trip in Chicago and "that ain't all".
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Often called "Toodles" but better known as "Squash". Looks so innocent that we haven't the heart to say anything about him. Lost his voice during the Senior trip in Chicago and "that ain't all".

name: Earl, E. Ashlock
description: A really hard worker—will even volunteer to do things that others dodge. We wonder what kind of heart is hidden beneath such a composed exterior—or is there a heart at all.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A really hard worker—will even volunteer to do things that others dodge. We wonder what kind of heart is hidden beneath such a composed exterior—or is there a heart at all.

name: Rollamo, Marion S. Badollet
description: Blame him for some of these pictures and even other things. Has never been outside of the Chemistry building since July 1st.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Blame him for some of these pictures and even other things. Has never been outside of the Chemistry building since July 1st.

name: Bardsley, Clarence E.
description: Often mistaken by the Freshmen to be a Prof. Had an awful time with that mustache, but now he can stroll around the campus in peace.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Often mistaken by the Freshmen to be a Prof. Had an awful time with that mustache, but now he can stroll around the campus in peace.

name: Rollamo, Charles Russell Barnard
description: Certainly an engineer of promise. The Frisco can't run enough trains between Springfield and Rolla to suit him. Has more than made his credit in Social Lab.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Certainly an engineer of promise. The Frisco can't run enough trains between Springfield and Rolla to suit him. Has more than made his credit in Social Lab.

name: Beyer, Daniel C.
description: Distinctly individual—even in taking Senior trips. East is East, though who could blame him. Tried everything in college except fussing.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Distinctly individual—even in taking Senior trips. East is East, though who could blame him. Tried everything in college except fussing.

name: Bohn, Edwin Joseph
description: Eddie hasn't anything particularly against studying, he just hasn't time for it. A typical M. S. M. athlete, with letters in track, football, and basketball.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Eddie hasn't anything particularly against studying, he just hasn't time for it. A typical M. S. M. athlete, with letters in track, football, and basketball.

name: Brazill, Matthew Patrick Jr.
description: The dashing young Romeo with the vamping eyes; who has saddened the heart of many a fair maiden. Our foremost theatrical star. Letters in football and track. "Cut this out too Mickie".
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The dashing young Romeo with the vamping eyes; who has saddened the heart of many a fair maiden. Our foremost theatrical star. Letters in football and track. "Cut this out too Mickie".

name: Bruce, Robert
description: A true student—in football. Drops more courses than most of us sign up for. Has a letter in track and made his fourth letter in football.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A true student—in football. Drops more courses than most of us sign up for. Has a letter in track and made his fourth letter in football.

name: Rollamo, George Burnet
description: One of the few who came back from the army a student. A real worker in the Senior Class, altho only a C. E. When the phonograph starts then the freshmen know that "Cap" is fussing.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: One of the few who came back from the army a student. A real worker in the Senior Class, altho only a C. E. When the phonograph starts then the freshmen know that "Cap" is fussing.

name: Cairns, Arthur Lee
motto: "If that goes in the Rollamo I'll—"
description: "Buddy" hails from Cape Girardeau, an outpost of civilization in Missouri. Will import anything. Fears exposure. Third letter in football.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"If that goes in the Rollamo I'll—"
"Buddy" hails from Cape Girardeau, an outpost of civilization in Missouri. Will import anything. Fears exposure. Third letter in football.

name: Rollamo, Lawrence Owen Casselman
description: A native son. Acquired even more nonchalance in the army. Just another place where dignity is mistaken for conceit.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A native son. Acquired even more nonchalance in the army. Just another place where dignity is mistaken for conceit.

name: Cunningham, Lorain H.
description: He is one of the married brethren and this fact has only increased his studiousness. In his bachelor days he won his letter in football.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is one of the married brethren and this fact has only increased his studiousness. In his bachelor days he won his letter in football.

name: Rollamo, Gerard Ernest
motto: "Eb boasts of Nebraska so persistently that one would almost think the state deserved an apology. Will always respond when called upon in Mass Meeting, and has never refused to argue on any subject."
clubs: N. S. N. Sec. Senior Class
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Eb boasts of Nebraska so persistently that one would almost think the state deserved an apology. Will always respond when called upon in Mass Meeting, and has never refused to argue on any subject."

name: Eulich, Artileus V.
motto: "Art is from St. Joe, however he is trying to live it down and we hope that he will too. Still remains quiet although he was in the army, but national amendments alter circumstances."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Art is from St. Joe, however he is trying to live it down and we hope that he will too. Still remains quiet although he was in the army, but national amendments alter circumstances."

name: Rollamo, William James Finley
description: Left us to try something even worse. One of the unknown fussers who really got by with it. Occasionally seen without McMillen.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Left us to try something even worse. One of the unknown fussers who really got by with it. Occasionally seen without McMillen.

name: Gettler, Carl Andrew
description: Which fact has not hindered in his quest for knowledge and other things not found in books. He is a gun in Organic and expects to be a Chemical Engineer some day.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Which fact has not hindered in his quest for knowledge and other things not found in books. He is a gun in Organic and expects to be a Chemical Engineer some day.

name: Rollamo, Osher Goldsmith
major: Prospector, A. I. M. & M. E.
description: All the way from Texas yet fresh as a lily. Attends school if there is nothing else to do. One of the two good men who returned to school and offered their services to various school activities.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: All the way from Texas yet fresh as a lily. Attends school if there is nothing else to do. One of the two good men who returned to school and offered their services to various school activities.

name: Leslie, Harloe
description: Back with us this year—or rather, back in the geology room. A real student hence almost unknown to us.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Back with us this year—or rather, back in the geology room. A real student hence almost unknown to us.

name: Rollamo, Karl William Heimberger
description: Back from France, but still the same—even to his voice. Will make Rolla famous yet, if he could only be heard. Never forgets the good old high school days.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Back from France, but still the same—even to his voice. Will make Rolla famous yet, if he could only be heard. Never forgets the good old high school days.

name: Wesley, George Hippard
description: Another mystery. A fusser yet seldom seen and even less heard of. Has been known to spend week-ends on the Gasconade during the long dreary summer weeks. Runs with and by Knight.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Another mystery. A fusser yet seldom seen and even less heard of. Has been known to spend week-ends on the Gasconade during the long dreary summer weeks. Runs with and by Knight.

name: Harland, H. Hoppock
description: Has spent years trying to live up to the family reputation. Has much wilder ideas than one would expect. Intends to use all the Calculus that he has learned and no doubt he will. Captain in football this year.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Has spent years trying to live up to the family reputation. Has much wilder ideas than one would expect. Intends to use all the Calculus that he has learned and no doubt he will. Captain in football this year.

name: Arthur, Mark Howald
description: Almost unknown, except to curious Freshmen. He is sure that the whole of one's college education may be found in books. Causes the librarian to work full time every night.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Almost unknown, except to curious Freshmen. He is sure that the whole of one's college education may be found in books. Causes the librarian to work full time every night.

name: Rollamo, Clifford P. Howard
clubs: Prospector, A. I. M. & M. E.
description: Born coal mining expert and admits it. Also an authority on first aid and mine rescue work, but has succumbed to an attack of the fairer sex.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Born coal mining expert and admits it. Also an authority on first aid and mine rescue work, but has succumbed to an attack of the fairer sex.

name: Howendobler, John L.
clubs: Prospector, A. I. M. & M. E.
description: Again! Still a rock hound as well as a reader of the Tulsa World. Continues to use two words when one would be enough.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Again! Still a rock hound as well as a reader of the Tulsa World. Continues to use two words when one would be enough.

name: Hummel, Carl B.
description: Quiet, and continues to grow more so. Looks most intelligent when he knows nothing about the subject at all. Has never been the same Carl since he swore off.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Quiet, and continues to grow more so. Looks most intelligent when he knows nothing about the subject at all. Has never been the same Carl since he swore off.

name: Hurd, Harold W.
description: Fond of night seances; but they too grow old. So sly and careful that even our kind cannot catch him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Fond of night seances; but they too grow old. So sly and careful that even our kind cannot catch him.

name: Rollamo, William Kahlbaum
description: Another who succumbed to the call of cupid. Still helps Fred take advantage of the Freshmen. Financially he should in time gain possession of everything—for look at the sources.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Another who succumbed to the call of cupid. Still helps Fred take advantage of the Freshmen. Financially he should in time gain possession of everything—for look at the sources.

name: Kershner, Karl Kenneth
description: Pride of the Chemistry Department. Leads a life of repose. Controls himself in all things.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Pride of the Chemistry Department. Leads a life of repose. Controls himself in all things.

name: Kroenlein, George A.
description: "George" graduated in December 1919, and is now running a plane-table somewhere down in the Oil Country. He was a gun in everything except fussing. "Bob" Dickerson's right hand man.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "George" graduated in December 1919, and is now running a plane-table somewhere down in the Oil Country. He was a gun in everything except fussing. "Bob" Dickerson's right hand man.

name: Leach, Thomas W.
description: Liked by everyone in the 400. Receives great quantities by mail; but saves postage by confining part of his attention to Rolla.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Liked by everyone in the 400. Receives great quantities by mail; but saves postage by confining part of his attention to Rolla.

name: Rollamo, Merryl Mccarthy
description: Not nearly so down-hearted as he looks. Reflects every problem of the age. Loves every member of the C. E. Department. Will never be forgotten because of his fame as an orator.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Not nearly so down-hearted as he looks. Reflects every problem of the age. Loves every member of the C. E. Department. Will never be forgotten because of his fame as an orator.

name: McMillen, F. M.
description: "Mac" had a way with the women, and we strongly suspect that one of them had a way with him. Known to have "knocked off" all of his Profs. in quizzes regularly. Also had a lingering for the Ozarks.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Mac" had a way with the women, and we strongly suspect that one of them had a way with him. Known to have "knocked off" all of his Profs. in quizzes regularly. Also had a lingering for the Ozarks.

name: Marston, Robert E.
description: "Bob" is another of those mid-year graduates. Lover of dogs of all brands as his extensive kennels will testify, being also a "rock-hound" of no mean ability himself.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Love me, love my dog".
"Bob" is another of those mid-year graduates. Lover of dogs of all brands as his extensive kennels will testify, being also a "rock-hound" of no mean ability himself.

name: Millar, Charles J.
motto: "If he ever did any work he is a good hand at keeping a secret—and we don't think he is".
description: Has it come to this? Joplin's pride. Has no inclination to ever argue.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"If he ever did any work he is a good hand at keeping a secret—and we don't think he is".
Has it come to this? Joplin's pride. Has no inclination to ever argue.

name: Miller, John G. Jr.
description: Indulges in midnight festivities with disastrous results. Loves night air and will ride for hours. Spends the days at H. & S.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Indulges in midnight festivities with disastrous results. Loves night air and will ride for hours. Spends the days at H. & S.

name: Murphy, Earl N.
description: Another victim of the blind archer. Has had trouble with Descriptive Geometry ever since he entered. Seen only at the gym. Letter in track.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Another victim of the blind archer. Has had trouble with Descriptive Geometry ever since he entered. Seen only at the gym. Letter in track.

name: Niece, William L.
description: Will gladly help the Professor lecture any time, and then check their own work. If it has anything to do with oil and gas—enough said. Never misses a dance.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Will gladly help the Professor lecture any time, and then check their own work. If it has anything to do with oil and gas—enough said. Never misses a dance.

name: Novak, Joseph Jr.
description: Could easily guess where he is from, fulfills all regulations. Loves hydraulics—even walks in a sine curve. Likes the chemistry department. Always willing to help with any school activity.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Could easily guess where he is from, fulfills all regulations. Loves hydraulics—even walks in a sine curve. Likes the chemistry department. Always willing to help with any school activity.

name: Rollamo, Peter Pietsch
description: Independent. Loves all his teachers and admits it. Has not been here long enough to realize the difference between various institutions of learning.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Independent. Loves all his teachers and admits it. Has not been here long enough to realize the difference between various institutions of learning.

name: Allen, D. Ports
description: He liked Rolla so well that he decided to stay after graduating in December. He is an instructor in the Met. Department, where he spends most of his time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He liked Rolla so well that he decided to stay after graduating in December. He is an instructor in the Met. Department, where he spends most of his time.

name: Rollamo, William Reed Quilliam
description: A very efficient young man, considering that he came from Texas. Too quiet and studious to be known to most of the "students".
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A very efficient young man, considering that he came from Texas. Too quiet and studious to be known to most of the "students".

name: Rackett, Gerald Franklin
description: "Rack", the big noise from Chicago, has been toned down since 1916, and is now docile as a lamb. Always busy and has actually done something while at M. S. M. Guided us during our troublesome Junior year and always made us conceited by his pride in us.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Rack", the big noise from Chicago, has been toned down since 1916, and is now docile as a lamb. Always busy and has actually done something while at M. S. M. Guided us during our troublesome Junior year and always made us conceited by his pride in us.

name: Schappler, Rudolph Charles
description: Speaks a dialect all his own. Could fool anyone. A gun in mathematics and fussing though we do hate to admit it.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Speaks a dialect all his own. Could fool anyone. A gun in mathematics and fussing though we do hate to admit it.

name: Schuman, Edwin Kaine
description: Heavyweight degree lugger of several schools. Can do anything from figuring out stresses and strains on bridges to selling you a can of tomatoes. In case you go to court about it, he will be your counsel for a nominal fee. Thinks lots of Rolla so intends to stay here.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Heavyweight degree lugger of several schools. Can do anything from figuring out stresses and strains on bridges to selling you a can of tomatoes. In case you go to court about it, he will be your counsel for a nominal fee. Thinks lots of Rolla so intends to stay here.

name: Sherwood, Theodore C., Jr.
description: "Ted" was another benedict who came back from the army after two years service, and brought his wife back with him. When not in the classroom he can usually be seen carrying groceries home or carrying wood from the woodshed to the kitchen.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Ted" was another benedict who came back from the army after two years service, and brought his wife back with him. When not in the classroom he can usually be seen carrying groceries home or carrying wood from the woodshed to the kitchen.

name: Shore, Harold F.
description: "Red" seldom studies yet manages to get by. "Bones" now and then sleeps a good while and fusses the rest of the time. E Pluribus Unum—Results?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Red" seldom studies yet manages to get by. "Bones" now and then sleeps a good while and fusses the rest of the time. E Pluribus Unum—Results?

name: Slover, Edwin Alsop
description: He is probably now at Columbia University inhaling the eastern brand of knowledge. He was a real gun in everything; but did not let that interfere with his fussing proclivities. In a pinch he could be relied upon to do most anything. Won an "M" in football in 1918.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is probably now at Columbia University inhaling the eastern brand of knowledge. He was a real gun in everything; but did not let that interfere with his fussing proclivities. In a pinch he could be relied upon to do most anything. Won an "M" in football in 1918.

name: Stoner, Oscar Eli
description: He came back to Rolla with his "frau" and got back into the swim of things easily. Another who left for the oil fields.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He came back to Rolla with his "frau" and got back into the swim of things easily. Another who left for the oil fields.

name: Stubbs, Robert Newton
description: "Bob" was editor of the Miner during the first semester, and after that decided to be a real student and do nothing but study. Is another real mourer that January 16th ever rolled around. Loves parties and will eat anything when out at such an occasion.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Bob" was editor of the Miner during the first semester, and after that decided to be a real student and do nothing but study. Is another real mourer that January 16th ever rolled around. Loves parties and will eat anything when out at such an occasion.

name: Swayze, Ronald Owen
description: "Swayze" hails from Kansas and he is a specialist in metallurgy. He received his "M" in basketball in '17 and '18, being captain of the 1918 team. At this writing he is one of Cox's army, being an assistant in Mineralogy.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Swayze" hails from Kansas and he is a specialist in metallurgy. He received his "M" in basketball in '17 and '18, being captain of the 1918 team. At this writing he is one of Cox's army, being an assistant in Mineralogy.

name: Rollamo, Mark Loren Terry
description: He is a "come-back" from "over there". He is taking life easy now after a strenuous campaign in former years. Has made numerous societies and more friends during his four years at M. S. M. Is a steady fusser and attends lectures at Rolla High School with alarming regularity.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is a "come-back" from "over there". He is taking life easy now after a strenuous campaign in former years. Has made numerous societies and more friends during his four years at M. S. M. Is a steady fusser and attends lectures at Rolla High School with alarming regularity.

name: Taggart, William Miskey Jr.
motto: "I don't want to make either one of them sore". "That egotistical fellow".
description: He is the real Beau Brummel at M. S. M. and when not wearing out the upholstering at a well known residence, is pursuing the line of least resistance under Prof. Dickerson. Has never been known to worry about such a thing as grades.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"I don't want to make either one of them sore". "That egotistical fellow".
He is the real Beau Brummel at M. S. M. and when not wearing out the upholstering at a well known residence, is pursuing the line of least resistance under Prof. Dickerson. Has never been known to worry about such a thing as grades.

name: Rollamo, Basil Harold Turner
description: A very quiet man—doesn't even snore in class. Indisposed toward exertion.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A very quiet man—doesn't even snore in class. Indisposed toward exertion.

name: Uthoff, Frederick William
description: He is one of those fellows who is always doing good for someone else. A clean sport and a real booster for M. S. M. He has no bad habits except smoking and is rarely seen without his pipe. He won his "M" in football in 1918.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is one of those fellows who is always doing good for someone else. A clean sport and a real booster for M. S. M. He has no bad habits except smoking and is rarely seen without his pipe. He won his "M" in football in 1918.

name: Rollamo, Rafael Estaban Velasco
description: A true son of Carranza, has come back to settle accounts and finally get his degree. Has a senorita waiting for him down in San Luis Potosi, and acts funny if he don't get a letter every day. Is a sleight-of-hand man and has given many men something to think about.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Concentrate"!
A true son of Carranza, has come back to settle accounts and finally get his degree. Has a senorita waiting for him down in San Luis Potosi, and acts funny if he don't get a letter every day. Is a sleight-of-hand man and has given many men something to think about.

name: Weigel, William Walbridge
description: Weigel is another of those quiet birds who know nothing about—at times. Is a real hobo and has been known to pass Rolla up on several occasions. Has some suggestions pertaining to the remodeling of the Phelps County Bastile.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Weigel is another of those quiet birds who know nothing about—at times. Is a real hobo and has been known to pass Rolla up on several occasions. Has some suggestions pertaining to the remodeling of the Phelps County Bastile.

name: Rollamo, Edgar A. Williams
description: "Ed" is hard to figure out, being also a Hannibalite, which is too far to travel for purposes of obtaining proper information. Is seen hovering about the Organic Lab. so much that the Customs Officials have already got their eye on him. He swears by and at Bash.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Ed" is hard to figure out, being also a Hannibalite, which is too far to travel for purposes of obtaining proper information. Is seen hovering about the Organic Lab. so much that the Customs Officials have already got their eye on him. He swears by and at Bash.

name: Wills, Ronald B.
description: Wills dug his grave in Prof. Harris' drawing room and is a steady customer up there. Started out as an inveterate fusser in his freshman year; however he has utterly forsaken this phase of college life in his later years.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Wills dug his grave in Prof. Harris' drawing room and is a steady customer up there. Started out as an inveterate fusser in his freshman year; however he has utterly forsaken this phase of college life in his later years.

name: Wright, Kenneth M.
clubs: A. I. M. E. & M. E.
description: "Kenny" has got so many jobs that he doesn't worry much about classes, nevertheless he was overtaken by Tau Beta Pi. When not in the Geology Lecture Room he may be found scheming in the Rollamo Office. Is President of the Senior Class. Has made three letters in basketball. Editor-in-Chief of the Rollamo 1920. As a fusser—deleted by censor.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Kenny" has got so many jobs that he doesn't worry much about classes, nevertheless he was overtaken by Tau Beta Pi. When not in the Geology Lecture Room he may be found scheming in the Rollamo Office. Is President of the Senior Class. Has made three letters in basketball. Editor-in-Chief of the Rollamo 1920. As a fusser—deleted by censor.

name: Ziesenes, Harry Wesley
description: Harmless creature who endures the rest of us without any fuss. Never found outside of the C. E. Department except at "Scotts"!
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Harmless creature who endures the rest of us without any fuss. Never found outside of the C. E. Department except at "Scotts"!
